text: Adobe continues to maintain leadership positioning across multiple software categories according to third-party market evaluations. The company was recognized as a leader in the Ecommerce Platform Companies Quadrant report, which evaluated over 100 companies with the top 15 recognized as leaders in online sales, marketing, and operations solutions C003. Adobe was also listed as a key market player in the Global Motion Graphics Market, which was valued at approximately USD 85.5 Billion in 2024 and expected to reach USD 280 Billion by 2034 at a 12.2% CAGR C008. Additionally, Adobe appears in the Web Conferencing Market Report and Forecast 2025-2034, benefiting from remote work trends and AI integration demand C012.
